attributes.rationale: Catalogue of security findings F-01..F-49 against the 9rh harness; identifies no-op macOS sandbox profile, missing trust separation, and 36 high-confidence prompt-injection sinks.

nodes.label: Security Finding F-01 (Critical): macOS sandbox profile no-op allow-all
nodes.author: jergensturdley

attributes.rationale: Sandbox profile reads `(version 1)(allow default)` — equivalent to no sandbox at all.

nodes.label: Security Finding F-02 (Critical): No trust separation between LLM output and input
nodes.author: jergensturdley

attributes.rationale: No untrusted envelope on LLM-produced text; tool args can be injected by prompt content.

nodes.label: Security Finding F-26 (High): Replay engine re-executes recorded tool calls
nodes.author: jergensturdley

attributes.rationale: Planted JSONL attack: attacker-supplied replay events cause execution of arbitrary tool calls during replay.

hyperedges.label: Critical security findings (F-01, F-02)
hyperedges.rationale: Two of four critical findings: no-op sandbox profile and missing LLM-output trust separation. Both are architectural defects rather than isolated bugs.
